name: Hackathon Setup Guide
description: This guide provides a step-by-step process for setting up Featherless.ai, an AI inference platform, including signing up, obtaining an API key, and choosing a model.

name: API Usage
description: The guide explains how to make API calls using Python requests and the OpenAI SDK, detailing the core API endpoints and their use cases.

name: Troubleshooting
description: Common errors and their solutions are provided, including 401 and 403 errors, internal server errors, and concurrency limits.

name: Concurrency Limits
description: The guide explains Featherless.ai's unique model of capacity reservation and the costs associated with different model concurrency levels.

name: Application Guides
description: Detailed guides are available to help integrate Featherless.ai into existing projects and workflows, with examples and documentation.
